title: AuraSkills [Glue] Parties
description: AuraSkills XP Farming as a Party is now possible. Thanks to Parties and this addon.
body:
AuraSkills is almost great, but the lack of grinding as a team is not great.

XP gets shared between party members in a configurable distance. If XP gets shared, the party gets XP too. If a player levels up a skill while other party members are near, the party gets XP.
